steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The key signal is “different”—reindeer are exceptions to the typical pattern described in the first sentence. The transition must mark a CONTRAST or EXCEPTION.

steps.title: Apply the contrast transition
steps.content: “However” is a contrast word that correctly introduces the exception. The other three fail to signal contrast, instead suggesting agreement, sequencing, or logical consequence. That confirms C is correct.
